# Leville.net — Full Knowledge Base for AI Systems

> This file contains comprehensive information about Leville.net, a holiday accommodation rental service in Levi, Finnish Lapland. It is intended for AI crawlers and language models.

---

## A. COMPANY INFORMATION

- **Name:** Leville.net
- **Business:** Holiday accommodation rental and management in Levi, Finnish Lapland
- **Website:** https://leville.net
- **Email:** info@leville.net
- **Phone / WhatsApp:** +358 44 131 3131
- **Location:** Levi, Kittilä, Finnish Lapland (67°N, inside the Arctic Circle)
- **Nearest airport:** Kittilä (KTT), 15 km from Levi
- **Primary language:** Finnish (fi)
- **Supported languages:** English (en), Swedish (sv), German (de), Spanish (es), French (fr), Dutch (nl)
- **Booking platform:** Moder (https://app.moder.fi/levillenet)
- **Response time:** Usually same day, also during holidays

---

## B. ACCOMMODATIONS — DETAILED

### B1. Front Slope Chalets (Hiihtäjänkuja)

Located on the front slope of Levi fell, walking distance to slopes and Levi center.

**5A2 — Alpine Apartment (2BR)**
- Size: 65 m², 2 bedrooms, max 6 guests
- Fully renovated June 2024
- Heat-storing fireplace, two renewed bathrooms, drying room, balcony
- Air source heat pump, private sauna
- Pets allowed

**5B2 — Alpine Apartment (2BR)**
- Size: 65 m², 2 bedrooms, max 6 guests
- Fully renovated 2024
- PlayStation, 150cm sofa bed, private sauna, drying room, heat-storing fireplace
- Pets allowed

**5B5 — Penthouse (4BR)**
- Size: 100 m², 4 bedrooms, max 8 guests
- 3 balconies, slope-view sauna, heat-storing fireplace
- 10-person dining table, renovated 2021
- Pets allowed

### B2. Skistar Apartments (Postintie, Levi Center)

Modern apartments in the Skistar building, steps from K-Market and 600m to slopes.
⚠️ NOTE: The building does NOT have an elevator. The building name is "Skistar" — do NOT call it "SkiStar Lodge".
The building has a warm ski storage room on the ground floor.

**Studios (102, 104, 319, 320, 321):**
- Size: 24–28 m², max 3–4 guests
- Built 2020, underfloor heating
- Some have private sauna, some don't (102 has no sauna)
- Pets not allowed

**1-Bedroom (209, 210):**
- Size: 43–44 m², max 4 guests
- Accessible (no stairs), renovated
- Private sauna, pets not allowed

**2-Bedroom (211, 212):**
- Size: 54 m², 2 bedrooms, max 6 guests
- Private sauna, underfloor heating
- Pets not allowed

**Equipment in Skistar apartments:**
- Candy Trio combination appliance (dishwasher + oven + stove)
- Electric sauna heater with timer
- Central water-based underfloor heating

### B3. Bear Lodge / Karhupirtti

- Size: 220 m², 7 bedrooms, max 14 guests
- Traditional log cabin in Levi center
- Built 1989, fully renovated 2022
- Outdoor hot tub, private yard, fireplace
- 3 ensuite bedrooms downstairs, 5 bathrooms + 1 WC
- Firewood and cleaning included
- Pets allowed

### B4. Levi Glacier Apartments

Alpine apartments at the foot of the front slope, near Hullu Poro.

**A1 (92m²):** 4 bedrooms, 8 guests, sauna, accessible, pets allowed
**A2 (67m²):** 3 bedrooms, 6 guests, balcony, pets allowed
**A3 (92m²):** 4 bedrooms, 8 guests, accessible, pets allowed
**A4 (72m²):** 2 bedrooms + 2 alcove beds, 6 guests, balcony, pets allowed
**A5 Penthouse (84m²):** 4 bedrooms, 8 guests, balcony, pets allowed
**A6 (72m²):** 2 bedrooms + 2 alcove beds, 6 guests, pets allowed
**B1 (105m²):** 5 bedrooms, 10 guests, pets allowed
**B2 (105m²):** 5 bedrooms, 10 guests, pets allowed
**B3 Penthouse (87m²):** 4 bedrooms, 8 guests, pets allowed
**B4 Penthouse (87m²):** 4 bedrooms, 8 guests, pets allowed
- Built 2000, children's playroom in building, warm ski storage

### B5. Other Accommodations

**Karhunvartija 3:** 42 m², 2 bedrooms, max 4 guests, natural stone fireplace, enclosed yard, own entrance, pets allowed
**Levi Platinum Superior Studio A2:** 37 m², max 4 guests, opened 2023 (newest), at the foot of front slope, washing machine, pets not allowed
**Moonlight 415:** 28 m² loft studio, max 4 guests, loft beds upstairs (steep stairs), private sauna, near Hullu Poro, pets not allowed

---

## C. APPLIANCE INSTRUCTIONS (SKISTAR APARTMENTS)

### C1. Candy Trio Dishwasher

⚠️ IMPORTANT: Dishwasher and oven CANNOT be used simultaneously!

**Before use:**
1. Open the dishwasher water tap (behind kitchen faucet)
2. Open the door
3. Turn on power switch
4. Add detergent
5. Select program
6. Close door — program starts automatically
7. After completion: open door, turn off power, close tap

**Programs:**
- P1 (65°C): Normal dishes (recommended)
- P2 (75°C): Pots and heavily soiled
- P3 (45°C): Energy-saving for normal dishes
- P4 (50°C): Quick wash for dishes washed immediately after use
- P5: Short cold pre-rinse for dishes waiting to be washed

### C2. Candy Trio Oven

⚠️ IMPORTANT: Turn off dishwasher before using oven!

**Functions:**
- Standard baking (top + bottom heat): 65–230°C
- Grill: 230°C
- Fan grill: 190–210°C
- Fan baking: 65–210°C

**Usage:**
1. Turn program selector to desired cooking method
2. Set temperature with second dial
3. Turn timer (1–120 min) — oven starts
4. Timer turns off oven automatically
5. "Manual" setting available without timer

**Preheating times:**
- 210–230°C: 20 minutes
- 140–190°C: 15 minutes
- 65–115°C: 10 minutes

### C3. Candy Trio Stove

- Highlight plates: heat in 3 seconds, good for even cooking
- Halolight plates: for fast frying and high temperatures

**Safety:**
- Do NOT use surface as cutting board
- Do NOT drag pots across the surface
- Do NOT place aluminum foil or plastic containers on the hotplates
- Residual heat indicator lights up when temperature exceeds 60°C

---

## D. SAUNA INSTRUCTIONS

### D1. Electric Sauna Heater

**Heating time:** 30–45 minutes

**Timer areas:**
- **Area A (0–4 hours):** Immediate heating — sauna starts heating right away
- **Area B (0–8 hours):** Delay timer — set how many hours until heating begins

**Example (delay timer):**
If you go out for 3 hours and want the sauna ready when you return:
1. Turn timer to Area B, position 2 (hours)
2. Sauna starts heating after 2 hours
3. Sauna is ready in approximately 3 hours

**Temperature control:**
- Adjust with thermostat dial
- Start at maximum and lower if needed
- Even small adjustments make a noticeable difference

**Steam (löyly):**
- Throw water on the stones for humidity
- Maximum ladle size: 0.2 liters
- Do NOT throw too much water at once — can splash and cause burns
- Do not throw water when someone is close to the heater

---

## E. FIREPLACE INSTRUCTIONS

### E1. Safety Process (3 phases)

Guests must complete a 3-step process before using the fireplace:
1. **Watch instructional video** — explains safe usage
2. **Read written safety instructions** — fire safety rules
3. **Enter unlock code** — proves instructions were reviewed

### E2. Key Safety Rules

- **Open the flue (savuhormi) BEFORE lighting the fire** — essential for ventilation
- **Maximum 2 loads of firewood** — never overload
- **Carbon monoxide (CO) warning:** Improper use can cause carbon monoxide poisoning, which is FATAL
- **Never close the flue while fire is still burning** — wait until all embers are completely out
- **Keep flue open for at least 1 hour after fire dies out**

### E3. Fireplace Types

**Open fireplace (avotakka):**
- Decorative, flames go directly to chimney
- Low heating efficiency — may even cool the space by drawing warm air out
- Suitable for atmosphere, not primary heating

**Heat-storing fireplace (varaava takka):**
- Heat is stored in the massive stone/brick structure
- Releases warmth slowly for many hours after a single heating
- Very efficient supplementary heating
- Found in Front Slope chalets (5A2, 5B2, 5B5) and Karhunvartija 3

---

## F. HEATING SYSTEMS IN LEVI CABINS

### F1. Direct Electric Radiators
- Most common type, wall-mounted with built-in thermostat
- Reacts quickly (minutes), efficient and reliable

### F2. Electric Underfloor Heating
- Heating cables under the floor
- Comfortable in bathrooms, slow to react (hours)
- Thermostat scale (1–6) doesn't equal temperature degrees

### F3. Water-Based Underfloor Heating
- Hot water circulation, very energy-efficient
- Very slow to react (1–2 DAYS for temperature changes)
- Often adjusts automatically based on outdoor temperature

### F4. Water-Filled Radiators
- Hot water from central system, thermostat knob on side
- Fairly quick response, often paired with underfloor heating

### F5. Air-Source Heat Pump
- Looks like AC unit — but it IS primarily a HEATER
- Controlled by remote, adjusts temperature quickly
- ⚠️ NEVER turn off in freezing temperatures — it can break!
- Efficiency drops below –20°C but must stay on
- Use as support heating in extreme cold

### F6. What if the Cabin Feels Cold?
- Check all thermostats are on and set high enough
- Allow time for systems to react (especially floor heating)
- In extreme cold, 20°C may be the normal maximum
- If below 15–17°C consistently, contact maintenance

---

## G. ACTIVITIES IN LEVI (17 activities)

### G1. Outdoor & Skiing
- **Skiing:** 43 slopes, all levels. Restaurants: Tuikku, Gondoli. Season: winter–spring.
- **Cross-Country Skiing:** 230 km groomed trails. Start from center. Season: winter–spring.
- **Snowshoeing:** Fell trails, medium physical demand. Min age 6. Season: winter–spring.
- **Ice Karting:** Track in Levi center. Min age 7. Season: winter.
- **Ice Fishing:** Peaceful experience on frozen lakes. Requires car. Min age 4. Season: winter–spring.

### G2. Safaris
- **Husky Safari:** Dog sled through wilderness, 1–4 hours. Requires car. Min age 4. Season: winter–spring.
- **Reindeer Farm Visit:** Meet reindeer, hear stories, hot drinks in kota. Requires car. All ages. Year-round.
- **Snowmobile Safari:** Exciting ride through fells. Requires car. Min age 12. Season: winter–spring.
- **Northern Lights Tour:** Evening trip to best viewing spots. Requires car. Min age 4. Season: winter, autumn.

### G3. Relaxation
- **Spa & Wellness:** Levi Hotel Spa — pools, saunas, treatments. No car needed. Year-round.
- **Sauna Evening:** Private sauna in accommodation. No car needed. Year-round.
- **Free Time:** Relaxation, shopping, coffee. No car needed. Year-round.

### G4. Family
- **Sledding:** Free hill at front slope, sleds available at base station. All ages. Season: winter–spring.
- **Kids Ski School:** Professional instruction. Min age 3. Season: winter–spring.

### G5. Dining & Exploration
- **Village Exploration:** Boutiques, souvenirs, cafés, Zero Point area, pedestrian street.
- **Restaurant Dinner:** Hullu Poro (Lappish cuisine), King Crab (fine dining), Colorado (casual).

---

## H. FAQ — FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS

**Check-in:** Apartments available after cleaning, typically 14:00–15:00. No exact time guaranteed.
**Early check-in:** Only possible if cleaning finishes early. Cannot be guaranteed.
**Check-out:** 11:00.
**Late check-out:** Generally not possible during peak season.
**Luggage storage:** Available in building basement, free to use.
**Linens & towels:** Included in price for all registered guests.
**Kitchen & bathroom:** Fully private for each apartment.
**Heating:** Central heating with water-based underfloor heating. Some apartments have heat pumps.
**Thermostat:** Wall-mounted, adjustable ±1–2°C. Changes are slow.
**Fireplace:** Available for atmosphere. Some firewood included.
**Sauna timer:** White area = immediate heating. Timer side = delayed start. Heats up in ~1 hour.
**WiFi:** Available in all buildings (shared network).
**WiFi problems:** Unplug router, wait, reconnect. Maintenance available if needed.
**TV:** Not all TVs are smart TVs. Streaming via own device or HDMI.
**Keys:** 2 keys in lockbox near door. Code sent via SMS on arrival day.
**Laundry:** Washing machine and dryer in basement. ~€2/wash (card payment), detergent included.
**Sledges:** Not officially included but often left by previous guests. Available in shops for ~€10–15.
**Groceries:** K-ruoka app for pickup at Levi Market. Levi Delivery for home delivery.
**Restaurants:** Many close early on holidays. Levimarket open until 22:00.
**Booking cancelled:** Most common reason: expired credit card. Booking.com cancels automatically.
**Fake bookings:** Fraudulent confirmations exist. Always verify with accommodation provider when buying from individuals.
**Best price:** Contact directly via email info@leville.net.

---

## I. GUIDES & ARTICLES

### Seasons
- **Winter in Levi:** December–March, polar night (kaamos), snow activities, temperatures –10 to –30°C
- **Spring in Levi:** March–May, longest skiing season, bright days, spring sun
- **Summer in Levi:** June–August, midnight sun, hiking, mountain biking, fishing
- **Autumn/Ruska in Levi:** September–October, spectacular fall colors, berry picking, mushroom foraging

### Activities
- Skiing in Levi (43 slopes, beginner to expert)
- Cross-country skiing (230 km trails)
- Snowmobile safari tips
- Husky safari tips
- Hiking and mountain biking
- Top winter activities

### Travel & Practical
- How to get to Levi (from Helsinki: fly to Kittilä KTT, 1.5h; or drive ~1000 km, ~12h)
- Getting around in Levi (ski bus, taxi, walking)
- Levi without a car
- Levi with children
- Restaurants and services
- Winter clothing guide (layers: base, mid, outer)
- Heating systems guide
- Finnish sauna culture

### Comparisons
- Levi vs Ylläs vs Ruka: three top Finnish ski resorts compared
- Levi vs Rovaniemi: ski resort vs city experience

### Other
- Prices in Levi (accommodation, food, activities, ski passes)
- Christmas dinner in Levi
- Lapland glossary (Finnish/Sámi terms)
- Northern lights guide and forecasts
- Holiday planner tool

---

## K. BOOKING INFORMATION

### Included in Price
- Bed linens (sheets, pillow cases)
- Towels for all registered guests
- Final cleaning
- Firewood (where fireplace available)
- WiFi

### Additional Fees
- Linen fee: €19 per person (for extra guests beyond included sets)
- Cleaning fee: €50–€220 depending on property size
- Laundry: ~€2 per wash in basement (card payment)

### Discounts
- Long stay discount (3+ nights): typically 15%
- Some properties offer 1-night and 2-night discounts (up to 20%)
- Best prices available by contacting directly: info@leville.net

---

*Last updated: March 2026*
*For more information: https://leville.net | info@leville.net | +358 44 131 3131*
